recent_projects.name: PraisonAI
recent_projects.summary: PraisonAI is an AI Agents Framework with Self Reflection. PraisonAI application combines PraisonAI Agents, AutoGen, and CrewAI into a low-code solution for building and managing multi-agent LLM systems, focusing on simplicity, customisation, and efficient human-agent collaboration.
recent_projects.author: Mervin Praison

recent_projects.name: pyrig
recent_projects.summary: A Python toolkit to rig up your project that standardizes and automates project setup, configuration and development.
recent_projects.author: Winipedia

recent_projects.name: fasthx
recent_projects.summary: FastAPI server-side rendering with built-in HTMX support.

recent_projects.name: radia
recent_projects.summary: Radia 3D Magnetostatics with NGSolve Integration and OpenMP Parallelization
recent_projects.author: Pascal Elleaume

recent_projects.name: openssl-encrypt
recent_projects.summary: A package for secure file encryption and decryption based on modern ciphers using heavy-compute-load chaining of hashing and KDF to generate strong encryption password based on users provided password to ensure secure encryption of files
recent_projects.author: Tobi

recent_projects.name: skyink
recent_projects.summary: Convert text to PX4 drone flight paths using Hershey stroke fonts
recent_projects.author: skyink contributors

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: PraisonAI
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: PraisonAI is an AI Agents Framework with Self Reflection. PraisonAI application combines PraisonAI Agents, AutoGen, and CrewAI into a low-code solution for building and managing multi-agent LLM systems, focusing on simplicity, customisation, and efficient human-agent collaboration.
